name: Status Badge
description: Compact monospace status pill used in Worker rows, session lists, and notification items. Combines a Unicode emoji dot (🟢/⚪/🔴/🟡) with a short uppercase label. Conveys Worker lifecycle state, task health, or notification severity in a single glance.

anatomy.description: Leading Unicode emoji circle, colored to match state semantics
Short uppercase state word, e.g. BUSY / IDLE / ERROR

structurePatterns: Inline-flex row, gap var(--space-1), align center
No background fill (transparent) — relies on the colored dot for encoding
Alternative solid variant: bg = state-color at 8% alpha, border-left 2px solid state-color, padding var(--space-1) var(--space-2)
usageHints: Use in Worker rows, session rows, notification items, and panel headers
Keep labels to ≤5 characters when in tight columns
The dot color carries the semantic meaning — label is reinforcement only
doNotInvent: Do not add icons beyond the Unicode emoji dot pattern
Do not use rounded pill backgrounds — TUI aesthetic favors flat or left-border-accent
